source_rationale: KRT7 is a cytokeratin expressed in aberrant basaloid cells, marking their epithelial lineage with luminal characteristics
KRT17 is a basal cytokeratin characteristic of basaloid cells in pathological lung remodeling
KRT19 marks simple epithelial cells and is upregulated in aberrant basaloid populations in fibrotic lung
KRT8 is a transitional state keratin associated with aberrant basaloid cells in lung fibrosis
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase strongly associated with aberrant basaloid cells in IPF
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-induced receptor enriched in lung epithelial cells including aberrant basaloid populations
FABP4 is a fatty acid binding protein and canonical marker of alveolar macrophages reflecting their lipid metabolism
APOC1 is an apolipoprotein highly expressed in alveolar macrophages involved in surfactant lipid processing
C1QA encodes complement component C1q subunit A, a hallmark of tissue-resident alveolar macrophages
C1QB encodes complement C1q subunit B, consistently co-expressed with C1QA in alveolar macrophages
LSAMP is a limbic system-associated membrane protein found enriched in alveolar macrophages in lung tissue
AGER (RAGE) is the canonical marker of alveolar type 1 cells, essential for gas exchange surface
EMP2 is an epithelial membrane protein highly expressed in AT1 cells lining the alveolar surface
CAV1 (caveolin-1) is a key structural protein of AT1 cells involved in caveolae formation for gas exchange
NTM (neurotrimin) is enriched in AT1 cells and used as a distinguishing marker in lung single-cell studies
LIMCH1 is a cytoskeletal regulator enriched in the thin, spread morphology of AT1 cells
SFTPC (surfactant protein C) is the definitive canonical marker of alveolar type 2 cells
SFTPB (surfactant protein B) is essential for surfactant function and highly expressed in AT2 cells
SFTPA1 (surfactant protein A1) is a collectin produced by AT2 cells for innate immune defense
SFTPA2 (surfactant protein A2) is co-expressed with SFTPA1 in AT2 cells for surfactant homeostasis
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor enriched in AT2 cells providing epithelial defense
NEDD4L regulates ENaC channels in AT2 cells, critical for alveolar fluid clearance
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain, highly expressed in B cells for antigen presentation
HLA-DRA encodes MHC class II alpha chain, constitutively expressed in B cells
BANK1 is a B cell-specific scaffold protein involved in BCR signaling
TNFRSF13C (BAFF-R) is a B cell survival receptor and canonical B cell lineage marker
AFF3 is a transcription factor preferentially expressed in B lymphocytes
ADAM28 is a disintegrin metalloproteinase preferentially expressed in B lymphocytes
KRT17 is a canonical basal cell cytokeratin marking the progenitor compartment of airway epithelium
KRT19 is expressed in basal cells of the airway epithelium
MIR205HG hosts miR-205, a well-known basal cell-specific microRNA in stratified epithelia
S100A2 is a calcium-binding protein enriched in basal cells of the airway epithelium
EYA2 is a transcriptional coactivator enriched in airway basal progenitor cells
DNAH12 encodes a dynein axonemal heavy chain essential for ciliary motility
CFAP299 is a cilia and flagella associated protein specific to ciliated cells
HYDIN is a central pair apparatus protein required for ciliary motility
DNAH9 encodes an outer dynein arm heavy chain critical for ciliary beat
RP1 is an axonemal protein associated with ciliary structure in multiciliated cells
AGBL4 is a tubulin deglutamylase involved in post-translational modification of ciliary tubulin
S100A8 (calgranulin A) is a canonical marker of classical monocytes and neutrophils
S100A9 (calgranulin B) forms a heterodimer with S100A8, highly expressed in classical monocytes
VCAN (versican) is a proteoglycan strongly upregulated in classical CD14+ monocytes
THBS1 (thrombospondin-1) is expressed by classical monocytes during inflammatory responses
NAMPT is an inflammatory mediator upregulated in activated classical monocytes
SCGB3A2 is a secretoglobin and canonical marker of club cells in distal airways
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin expressed in club cells of the airway epithelium
SFTPB is expressed in club cells in addition to AT2 cells, supporting surfactant production in airways
CYP2B7P is a cytochrome P450 family member associated with xenobiotic metabolism in club cells
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-responsive receptor enriched in secretory airway epithelial cells including club cells
WDFY4 is a specific marker of cDC1 required for cross-presentation of antigens
HLA-DPB1 encodes MHC class II beta chain, highly expressed in antigen-presenting cDC1 cells
HLA-DPA1 encodes MHC class II alpha chain, co-expressed with HLA-DPB1 in cDC1
HLA-DQA1 is an MHC class II gene highly expressed in professional antigen-presenting cDC1 cells
CST3 (cystatin C) is highly expressed in dendritic cells and used as a pan-DC marker
HLA-DPB1 is highly expressed in cDC2 cells as professional antigen-presenting cells
HLA-DQA1 is an MHC class II gene enriched in cDC2 for antigen presentation
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by cDC2 cells and involved in tissue repair signaling
CSF2RA (GM-CSF receptor alpha) is important for cDC2 development and survival
CD74 is the invariant chain for MHC class II, highly expressed in cDC2 antigen-presenting cells
CCL5 (RANTES) is a chemokine constitutively expressed by cytotoxic T lymphocytes
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule protein expressed in CD8+ cytotoxic T cells and NK cells
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is produced by activated cytotoxic T cells during immune responses
FYN is a Src family kinase critical for T cell receptor signaling in cytotoxic T cells
SYTL3 is involved in cytotoxic granule exocytosis in effector T cells
S100B is a calcium-binding protein highly expressed in Langerhans cells
ENTPD1 (CD39) is an ectonucleotidase expressed on Langerhans-type dendritic cells
HLA-DQB2 is an MHC class II gene enriched in Langerhans dendritic cells
HLA-DPB1 is highly expressed in Langerhans cells as professional antigen-presenting cells
SLC8A1 is a sodium-calcium exchanger enriched in Langerhans-type dendritic cells
DCN (decorin) is a canonical fibroblast marker, a proteoglycan involved in collagen fibril assembly
CFD (complement factor D/adipsin) is highly expressed in lung fibroblasts
FBLN1 (fibulin-1) is an extracellular matrix glycoprotein produced by fibroblasts
CCDC80 is a secreted protein enriched in fibroblasts involved in ECM organization
IGFBP6 is an IGF binding protein preferentially expressed by fibroblasts
MGP (matrix Gla protein) is an ECM component highly expressed in lung fibroblasts
SCGB3A1 is a secretoglobin highly expressed in goblet cells of the airway epithelium
SCGB1A1 (uteroglobin/CC16) is a major secretory product of goblet and secretory airway cells
BPIFB1 is a bactericidal protein secreted by goblet cells for innate mucosal defense
WFDC2 (HE4) is a protease inhibitor secreted by goblet cells in the airway
SLPI is a secretory leukocyte protease inhibitor abundantly produced by goblet cells
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytotoxic effector molecule expressed in cytotoxic ILCs
KLRD1 (CD94) is a killer cell lectin receptor marking innate lymphoid cells with cytotoxic function
CD69 is an early activation marker highly expressed on tissue-resident innate lymphoid cells
MCTP2 is enriched in innate lymphoid cell populations in lung tissue
SYTL3 is involved in granule exocytosis in cytotoxic innate lymphoid cells
KLRB1 (CD161) is a canonical marker of ILC subsets, particularly ILC2 and ILC3
AREG (amphiregulin) is a hallmark effector cytokine of ILC2 cells for tissue repair
IL7R (CD127) is a canonical marker of ILC2 cells required for their development and maintenance
XCL1 is a chemokine produced by activated ILCs for immune cell recruitment
CD69 is a tissue-residency marker highly expressed on ILCs in mucosal tissues
TFCP2L1 is a transcription factor that is a defining marker of pulmonary ionocytes
PDE1C is a phosphodiesterase enriched in ionocytes of the airway epithelium
CLNK is a cytokine-dependent hematopoietic cell linker enriched in ionocytes
ANK2 is an ankyrin involved in ion channel organization, consistent with ionocyte ion transport function
PACRG is associated with cilia and ion transport pathways enriched in ionocytes
CCL21 is a canonical lymphatic endothelial chemokine that guides immune cell trafficking to lymphatics
TFF3 is a trefoil factor enriched in lymphatic endothelial cells
IGFBP7 is an IGF binding protein expressed in endothelial cells including lymphatic endothelium
GNG11 is a G protein subunit enriched in endothelial cells including lymphatic endothelium
AKAP12 is a scaffolding protein involved in endothelial barrier function in lymphatic vessels
SPP1 (osteopontin) is a canonical marker of activated/profibrotic macrophages in lung tissue
CTSB (cathepsin B) is a lysosomal protease highly expressed in macrophages for antigen processing
APOE is an apolipoprotein expressed by tissue macrophages involved in lipid metabolism
FTL (ferritin light chain) is highly expressed in macrophages reflecting iron storage function
SLC16A10 is a monocarboxylate transporter enriched in tissue macrophages
TPSB2 (tryptase beta 2) is a canonical mast cell-specific serine protease
TPSAB1 (tryptase alpha/beta 1) is a defining mast cell protease used for identification
CPA3 (carboxypeptidase A3) is a mast cell-specific protease stored in secretory granules
IL1RL1 (ST2/IL-33 receptor) is highly expressed on mast cells mediating type 2 immune responses
SLC24A3 is a sodium/calcium exchanger enriched in mast cells
BIRC3 is an anti-apoptotic protein upregulated in mature/activated dendritic cells via NF-κB signaling
CSF2RA (GM-CSF receptor) is important for dendritic cell maturation and survival
WFDC21P is a dendritic cell-enriched transcript used as a marker in lung DC populations
CERS6 is a ceramide synthase upregulated during dendritic cell maturation
TXN (thioredoxin) is upregulated in mature DCs and involved in antigen presentation
C3 (complement component 3) is highly expressed by mesothelial cells lining serous cavities
ITLN1 (intelectin-1/omentin) is a canonical mesothelial cell marker
PLA2G2A is a phospholipase A2 highly expressed in mesothelial cells
HP (haptoglobin) is produced by mesothelial cells as part of serosal immune defense
TIMP1 is a metalloproteinase inhibitor expressed by mesothelial cells for ECM regulation
CLIC4 is a chloride intracellular channel enriched in mesothelial cells
COL1A1 (collagen type I alpha 1) is a canonical marker of myofibroblasts producing fibrillar collagen
COL1A2 (collagen type I alpha 2) is co-expressed with COL1A1 in activated myofibroblasts
COL3A1 (collagen type III) is a major ECM component produced by myofibroblasts in fibrosis
LUM (lumican) is a proteoglycan enriched in myofibroblasts involved in collagen fibrillogenesis
DCN (decorin) is an ECM proteoglycan highly expressed in myofibroblasts
LAMA2 (laminin alpha 2) is a basement membrane component produced by myofibroblasts
NKG7 is a cytotoxic granule membrane protein and canonical NK cell marker
GNLY (granulysin) is a cytolytic protein highly expressed in NK cells
KLRD1 (CD94) is a killer cell lectin receptor that is a canonical NK cell marker
GZMB (granzyme B) is a serine protease in cytotoxic granules of NK cells
CCL4 (MIP-1β) is a chemokine abundantly produced by activated NK cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta chain) is part of the NK cell activating receptor complex
LST1 is a leukocyte-specific transcript enriched in non-classical CD16+ monocytes
NAMPT is an inflammatory mediator expressed in non-classical monocytes
IFITM2 is an interferon-induced transmembrane protein enriched in non-classical monocytes
WARS (tryptophanyl-tRNA synthetase) is upregulated in non-classical monocytes during inflammation
RNF144B is a ubiquitin ligase enriched in non-classical monocyte populations
RGS5 is a canonical pericyte marker, a regulator of G-protein signaling in mural cells
CALD1 (caldesmon) is a smooth muscle/pericyte cytoskeletal protein
COL4A1 (collagen IV alpha 1) is a basement membrane component produced by pericytes
COL4A2 (collagen IV alpha 2) is co-expressed with COL4A1 in pericytes for basement membrane assembly
MYL9 (myosin light chain 9) is a contractile protein expressed in pericytes
IGFBP7 is highly expressed in pericytes and used as a pericyte/mural cell marker
JCHAIN (joining chain) is essential for IgA/IgM polymerization and a canonical plasma cell marker
IGHA1 (IgA heavy chain) is highly expressed in mucosal plasma cells producing IgA
IGHG1 (IgG1 heavy chain) is expressed by IgG-secreting plasma cells
IGHG3 (IgG3 heavy chain) is expressed by class-switched plasma cells
IGHG2 (IgG2 heavy chain) reflects active immunoglobulin secretion by plasma cells
GZMB is paradoxically highly expressed in plasmacytoid DCs with immunoregulatory function
IRF4 is a key transcription factor in plasmacytoid dendritic cell differentiation
JCHAIN is expressed in pDCs, reflecting their shared developmental origin with plasma cells
FCHSD2 is an FCH domain protein enriched in plasmacytoid dendritic cells
SEL1L3 is enriched in pDCs and involved in ER-associated processes supporting high secretory activity
GRP (gastrin-releasing peptide) is the canonical marker of pulmonary neuroendocrine cells
NRG1 (neuregulin 1) is a growth factor enriched in neuroendocrine cells of the lung
NKAIN2 is a Na+/K+ ATPase interacting protein enriched in neuroendocrine cells
NEBL (nebulette) is enriched in pulmonary neuroendocrine cells
SEC11C is a signal peptidase enriched in secretory neuroendocrine cells
IL2RA (CD25) is the canonical marker of regulatory T cells, essential for IL-2 signaling
BATF is a transcription factor important for Treg cell differentiation and function
IL32 is a pro-inflammatory cytokine expressed by activated regulatory T cells
SKAP1 is a T cell adaptor protein involved in TCR signaling in regulatory T cells
CD247 (CD3 zeta) is part of the TCR complex expressed on regulatory T cells
MYL9 (myosin light chain 9) is a canonical smooth muscle contractile protein
TPM2 (tropomyosin 2) is a smooth muscle-specific contractile filament protein
CALD1 (caldesmon) is a smooth muscle-specific actin-binding protein regulating contraction
DSTN (destrin) is an actin-depolymerizing factor enriched in smooth muscle cells
PRKG1 (cGMP-dependent protein kinase) mediates smooth muscle relaxation
ITK is a tyrosine kinase essential for T cell receptor signaling, specific to T lymphocytes
FYN is a Src family kinase critical for proximal TCR signaling in T cells
CD69 is an early T cell activation marker and tissue-residency marker
CNOT6L is a deadenylase enriched in T cell populations in lung tissue
CRYBG1 is enriched in T cell populations in single-cell lung studies
CLDN5 (claudin-5) is a tight junction protein canonical to vascular endothelial cells
MGP (matrix Gla protein) is enriched in arterial endothelial cells preventing calcification
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is a transcription factor highly expressed in arterial endothelial cells
VWF (von Willebrand factor) is a canonical endothelial marker for hemostasis
DEPP1 is a hypoxia-responsive gene enriched in arterial endothelial cells
CLDN5 is a tight junction protein highly expressed in capillary endothelial cells
HPGD (15-PGDH) is a prostaglandin-degrading enzyme marking general capillary (gCap) endothelial cells
ADGRL2 is an adhesion GPCR enriched in capillary endothelial cells
IFI27 is an interferon-stimulated gene highly expressed in capillary endothelial cells
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is a key endothelial transcription factor expressed in capillary endothelium
FCN3 (ficolin-3) is a canonical marker of aerocyte (aCap) capillary endothelial cells in the lung
EPAS1 (HIF-2α) is highly expressed in pulmonary capillary endothelial cells
LDB2 is a LIM domain binding protein enriched in capillary endothelial cells
VWF is a canonical endothelial marker expressed in capillary endothelium
CLDN5 is a tight junction protein marking vascular endothelial cells
SPARCL1 is an ECM protein enriched in peribronchial vascular endothelial cells
ADAMTS9 is a metalloproteinase enriched in peribronchial endothelial cells
VWF is a canonical endothelial marker expressed in peribronchial vessels
ZNF385D is a zinc finger protein enriched in peribronchial endothelial cells
TCF4 is a transcription factor enriched in peribronchial vascular endothelium
VWF is a canonical endothelial marker with highest expression in venous endothelium
ACKR1 (DARC/Duffy) is a canonical marker of venous endothelial cells
CLU (clusterin) is enriched in venous endothelial cells
PTPRB is a receptor tyrosine phosphatase expressed in vascular endothelial cells
ADAMTS9 is a metalloproteinase enriched in venous endothelial cells
